_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: ctk1Δ spores were viable, while the double mutant ctk1Δ ira2Δ spores formed minute colonies
details: ctk1Δ ira2Δ double mutant showed synthetic lethality, forming only minute colonies in tetrad analysis
